intro.label: 1_intro.mp4
intro.subtitle: Hi, my name is Emily and today we'll be conducting your job interview together. Please make yourself comfortable.

profanity_warning.label: 26_be_respectful.mp4
profanity_warning.subtitle: Please use respectful language during the interview. Let's return to the interview questions.

english_warning.label: 40_english.mp4
english_warning.subtitle: Oh, would you mind saying it in English?

english_practice.label: 41_no_spanish.mp4
english_practice.subtitle: I do understand Spanish, but you are here to practice English language!

off_topic_1.label: 42_off_topic_1.mp4
off_topic_1.subtitle: We can come back later to that topic. For now let's focus on the main objective, please.

off_topic_2.label: 43_off_topic_2.mp4
off_topic_2.subtitle: That's an interesting topic. For now let's focus on the main objective, please.

finish.label: 30_wonderful_day.mp4
finish.subtitle: Thank you very much for your time today, it was a pleasure speaking with you and we'll be in touch. Have a wonderful day.

interview.title: Emily Interview Coach - Horizontal Version
interview.description: A seven-question job interview speaking practice flow for SilverClassroom students.

questions.prompt: What is the position you are interested in?
questions.hint: Mention a job or professional area using a complete sentence.
questions.exampleAnswer: I am interested in working as a legal advisor.
modelAnswers: I am interested in the position of administrative assistant.
I want to work as a lawyer.
I am interested in working as a legal advisor.
I am interested in working in finance.
acceptablePatterns: i am interested in the position of
i'm interested in the position of
i would like to work as
i am interested in working as
i am interested in working in

video.label: 2_Q1_interested_in.mp4
video.subtitle: What is the position you are interested in?

studentInput.placeholder: Example: I am interested in working as a legal advisor.

onLimitReached.message: You have reached the repeat limit. Please use Hint or Modeling Answer if you need support.

feedbackText.good_answer: Great. You mentioned the position clearly.
feedbackText.partial_answer: Try this: “I am interested in working as a legal advisor.”
feedbackText.too_short: Please answer with a complete sentence. Example: “I am interested in working as a legal advisor.”
feedbackText.spanish_detected: Please answer in English. Example: “I am interested in working as a legal advisor.”
feedbackText.profanity_detected: Please use professional language during the interview. Let's try again.
feedbackText.hint_requested: Hint: Say the job or professional area you want. Use: “I am interested in working as...”
feedbackText.modeling_requested: Model answer: “I am interested in working as a legal advisor.”
